com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXObjectMatcher


  • public interface IXObjectMatcher
    Object matcher indicates whether two objects (one from current and one from reference design) match each other in a comparison according to some criteria. Matched objects are considered to be somehow related and are presented to the user during comparison as either fully identical or as similar with some differences. These differences are identified by a comparator IXObjectComparator

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean matchObjects(IXObject o1, IXObject o2)
      Take 2 objects and return if they match

    • Method Detail

      • matchObjects

        boolean matchObjects(IXObject o1,
                     IXObject o2)
        Take 2 objects and return if they match
        Parameters:
        o1 - first object
        o2 - second object
        Returns:
        true if they match
